chunks.text: Academics and Admissions. Berkeley EECS offers one of the most comprehensive instructional and research programs available anywhere in our field. We have a particular strength in large interdisciplinary real-world system projects that bring to bear core technologies seamlessly across electrical engineering and computer science.
Graduate Degree Programs. The goal of the EECS graduate programs is to develop each student’s capacity for original and incisive thinking.
Courses. Our roster of fine courses includes CS61A, named one of the '5 Best CS Classes in the US.'
Undergraduate Programs. We provide a distinguished undergraduate education, with the flexibility to choose the program that works for you.
A Message to Prospective Women Students. Messages from some of our women faculty and students, and some resources available to support women in EE and CS.
